name: memory
description: Persistent key-value memory store across sessions via MCP knowledge graph

files.pack.toml:
[pack]
name = "memory"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Persistent key-value memory store across sessions via MCP knowledge graph"
authors = ["PackWeave"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/PackWeave/registry"
keywords = ["memory", "knowledge-graph", "persistence", "mcp"]

[[servers]]
name = "memory"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory@latest"]
transport = "stdio"
tools = ["create_entities", "create_relations", "add_observations", "delete_entities", "delete_observations", "delete_relations", "read_graph", "search_nodes", "open_nodes"]
